---
title: "Untitled"
output: html_document
date: "2025-07-14"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## R Markdown

This is an R Markdown document. Markdown is a simple formatting syntax for authoring HTML, PDF, and MS Word documents. For more details on using R Markdown see <http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com>.

When you click the **Knit** button a document will be generated that includes both content as well as the output of any embedded R code chunks within the document. You can embed an R code chunk like this:

```{r cars}
summary(cars)
```

## Including Plots

You can also embed plots, for example:

```{r pressure, echo=FALSE}
plot(pressure)
```

Note that the `echo = FALSE` parameter was added to the code chunk to prevent printing of the R code that generated the plot.

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
rm(list=ls())

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(jtools)
library(foreign)
library(survival)
library(MASS)
library(nnet)
library(epiDisplay)
library(purrr)

df <- read.csv("positive_patients.csv",
               stringsAsFactors = FALSE)  

keep_as_is <- c("age", "treat_days", "event_status", "patient_id")

df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    across(-all_of(keep_as_is), as.factor),  # 除了这些列，全部转因子
    age = as.numeric(age),
    treat_days = as.numeric(treat_days),
    event_status = as.numeric(event_status),
    patient_id = as.character(patient_id),
    菌株号 = as.character(菌株号),
    symptom_status = factor(sym.aTB.0..sTB.1.,
                            levels = c(1, 0),
                            labels = c("Symptomatic", "Asymptomatic"))
  )

str(df)
```

```{r df}

summary_table <- df %>%
  select(where(~ is.factor(.))) %>%
  map_dfr(~ {
    tbl <- as.data.frame(table(.))
    tbl$Prop <- round(prop.table(tbl$Freq), 3)
    colnames(tbl)[1] <- "Level"
    return(tbl)
  }, .id = "Variable")

print(summary_table)


```

```{r 1}
df %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    median_age = median(age, na.rm = TRUE),
    Q1_age = quantile(age, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    Q3_age = quantile(age, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

df_day <- df[df$outcomes != 3, ]
df_day %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    median_day = median(treat_days, na.rm = TRUE),
    Q1_day = quantile(treat_days, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    Q3_day = quantile(treat_days, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE)
  )


```

```{r 7}

data <- matrix(c(307,626,108,219,467,542), nrow = 3 ,byrow = TRUE)
colnames(data) <- c("亚临床","活动")
rownames(data) <- c("L2", "L4","Others/Unknown")
prop.table(data, margin = 2)

print(data)

# 执行卡方检验
chisq.test(data)
```


```{r 4}
df <- df %>%
  mutate(sym.aTB.0..sTB.1. = factor(sym.aTB.0..sTB.1.,
                                    levels = c(1, 0),
                                    labels = c("Symptomatic", "Asymptomatic")))

table_gender <- table(df$gender.male.1..female.0.,df$sym.aTB.0..sTB.1.)
table_gender
prop.table(table_gender, margin = 2)
chisq.test(table_gender)

```

```{r 11}

table_age<-table(df$age_cat,df$sym.aTB.0..sTB.1.)
table_age
prop.table(table_age, margin = 2)
chisq.test(table_age)
```


```{r age}
df %>%
  group_by(sym.aTB.0..sTB.1.) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    median_age = median(age, na.rm = TRUE),
    Q1 = quantile(age, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    Q3 = quantile(age, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE)
  )
wilcox.test(age ~ sym.aTB.0..sTB.1., data = df)

```

```{r day}
df_day %>%
  group_by(sym.aTB.0..sTB.1.) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    median_treatday = median(treat_days, na.rm = TRUE),
    Q1 = quantile(treat_days, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    Q3 = quantile(treat_days, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE)
  )
wilcox.test(treat_days ~ sym.aTB.0..sTB.1., data = df_day)
```

```{r 13}

table_minzu<-table(df$minority.no.0..yes.1.,df$sym.aTB.0..sTB.1.)
table_minzu
prop.table(table_minzu, margin = 2)
chisq.test(table_minzu)

```

```{r 14}
##户籍类别
table_huji<-table(df$migrant.no.0.yes.1..,df$sym.aTB.0..sTB.1.)
table_huji
prop.table(table_huji, margin = 2)
chisq.test(table_huji)

```

```{r 15}

table_zhiye<-table(df$occupation,df$sym.aTB.0..sTB.1.)
table_zhiye
prop.table(table_zhiye, margin = 2)
chisq.test(table_zhiye)

```


```{r 17}

df_1 <- df[df$smear0.negative.2..positive.1. != 3, ]
df_1 <- droplevels(subset(df, smear0.negative.2..positive.1. != 3))

result<-table(df_1$smear0.negative.2..positive.1.,df_1$sym.aTB.0..sTB.1.)
result
prop.table(result, margin = 2)
chisq.test(result)
```

```{r 18}
jieju<-table(df$outcomes,df$sym.aTB.0..sTB.1.)
jieju
prop.table(jieju, margin = 2)
chisq.test(jieju)
```


```{r 20}

yue2 <- table(df$smear2.negative.2..positive.1.,df$sym.aTB.0..sTB.1.)
yue2
prop.table(yue2, margin = 2)
chisq.test(yue2)

```

```{r tang}
tang <- table(df$diabetes,df$sym.aTB.0..sTB.1.)
tang
prop.table(tang, margin = 2)
chisq.test(tang)

```

```{r culture}
cul <-table(df$culture0, df$sym.aTB.0..sTB.1.)
cul
prop.table(cul, margin = 2)
df_2 <- df[df$culture0 != 3, ]
df_2 <- droplevels(subset(df, culture0 != 3))
cul1 <-table(df_2$culture0, df_2$sym.aTB.0..sTB.1.)
cul1
chisq.test(cul1)
```

```{r fenzi}
fen <-table(df$fenzi0, df$sym.aTB.0..sTB.1.)
fen
prop.table(fen, margin = 2)
df_3 <- df[df$fenzi0 != 3, ]
df_3 <- droplevels(subset(df, fenzi0 != 3))
fen1 <-table(df_3$fenzi0, df_3$sym.aTB.0..sTB.1.)
fen1
prop.table(fen1,margin = 2)
chisq.test(fen1)

```

```{r lineage}
lin <-table(df$lineage, df$sym.aTB.0..sTB.1.)
lin
prop.table(lin, margin = 2)
df_4 <- df[df$lineage != 3, ]
df_4 <- droplevels(subset(df, lineage != 3))
df_4 <- df_4[df_4$lineage != 0, ]
df_4 <- droplevels(subset(df_4, lineage != 0))
lin1 <-table(df_4$lineage, df_4$sym.aTB.0..sTB.1.)
lin1
prop.table(lin1,margin = 2)
chisq.test(lin1)

```

```{r dr}
dr <-table(df$Drug.resistance.profile.sus.0.dr.1.mdr.2., df$sym.aTB.0..sTB.1.)
dr
prop.table(dr, margin = 2)
df_5 <- df[df$Drug.resistance.profile.sus.0.dr.1.mdr.2. != 3, ]
df_5 <- droplevels(subset(df, Drug.resistance.profile.sus.0.dr.1.mdr.2. != 3))

dr1 <-table(df_5$Drug.resistance.profile.sus.0.dr.1.mdr.2., df_5$sym.aTB.0..sTB.1.)
dr1
prop.table(dr1,margin = 2)
chisq.test(dr1)
```

```{r source}
table_sou <- table(df$source,df$sym.aTB.0..sTB.1.)
table_sou
prop.table(table_sou, margin = 2)
chisq.test(table_sou)

```
